ItacAcademyItem.Name: Applicati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of the Applicati Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Cimalba, Lotario, La verità mentita per amore, opera scenica di Lotario Cimalba d`Urbino, donata à gl`Accademici Applicati di Ferrara. Da medesimi dedicata all`illustrissimo Sig. il Sig. marchese Onofrio Bevilacqua marchese di Machastorno (In Ferrara: per l`Erede del Giglio, 1682). Available online: http://www.urfm.braidense.it/rd/01324.pdf. I could not verify Maylender`s information that there is another book related to this Academy as reported by Baruffaldi, Notizie istoriche delle accademie ferraresi (1787) - Il principe giardiniero (Ferrara, Pomatelli, 1687)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
